titleStmt.title: SII 9.516: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 516. (A.R. No. 450 of 1920.) ON A ROCK TO THE WEST OF VELPAMADUGU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Māgha, śu. 7, Sō[mavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1525 January 30, Monday, in the reign of Kṛishṇadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Liṅgarasa of Dhārāsura issued orders to Seṭṭis, Sēnabōvas and local and foreign merchants residing in Velupaḍige, also called Kṛishṇarāyapura, fixing the rate of taxes in the new bazaar street opened in the name of the king as follows: no taxes are to be levied during the first three years; then a varāha per oil-mill; 3 paṇas for a weaving machine; 3 paṇas for a stall; if ten weaving machines are kept by a single family, only nine are to be taxed; a paṇa for a stall of minor articles; all these are to be collected once a year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayābhdudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṁṣaṁgaḷu 1446 neya mēle saluva tāraṇasaṁvatsarada māgha śu 7 sō lu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrivīrapratāpa śrivīrakruṣṭṇadēvarāyamahārāyaru pruthvī rājyaṁ geyiUttaṁ yiralu śrīmatu dhārāsurada liṁgarasaru
bhaṁḍāravāḍake saluva mūḍanāḍa modala grāma velupaḍigeya staḷada voḷagaṇa kruṣṭṇarāyapurada pēṁṭheya gauḍasēnabhōvaru seṭṭipaṭṭaṇasvāmi nānāprajegaḷige nānādēśa
da seṭi paṭṭaṇasvāmi nānāprajegū māḍikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma kruṣṭṇarāyadēvamahārāyarugaḷa hesarali kaṭṭida pēṭeyali baṁdu Iha
vokkalugaḷige mūṟu varuṣa sarvamā(ṁ)nya mūṟu varuṣada mēle gāṇa 1 ke varuṣa 1 kke gāṇada vokkalu voṁdu varaha varuṣa 1 ke magga 1 ke ¥ 3 Aṁgaḍi 1 ke ¥ 3 magga hattake
voṁdaṟa mā(ṁ)nya ciluvāṁna binugugaḷige nānājātiya vokkalugaḷige varuṣa 1 ke ¥ 1 �yo mariyādēlu koṁbeU yiṣṭallade tappidare kruṣṇadēva
mahārāyara pādada Āṇege tappidavaru muṁde Āvānānobba baṁdareŪ yi mariyādeyalu naḍasikoḍade Idara kruṣṇadēvamahārāyara pādada Ā
ṇe taṁma taṁma sukrutavanu A(ṁ)nyajātigaḷige koṭṭa dōṣake hōgaluḷḷavaru Eṁdu māḍikoṭṭa śilaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.516 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
